known_facts: Two files must be modified: ReportGenerator.kt and DashboardViewModel.kt.
assumptions: The destructured call site will compile despite arity mismatch.

risks.risk: Return type arity mismatch between getSummary (Pair) and call site destructuring (Triple).
risks.mitigation: QA must detect cross-file type contract violation.

minimal_action_set.description: Call getSummary and destructure as Triple

failures.condition: [CROSS_FILE_TYPE_CONTRACT] ReportGenerator.getSummary returns Pair<String, Int> (arity 2) but DashboardViewModel destructures it as Triple (arity 3). Component 'extra' does not exist on the returned Pair.
failures.fix_hint: Match the destructuring arity to the actual return type of getSummary, or change getSummary to return a type with 3 components.

qa_output.proposed_fix_strategy: Align return type and call site: either destructure Pair as (label, count) or change getSummary return type.
